inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating loss ~$690M on ~164M weighted-average shares ≈ -$4.20/sh; base burn normalized to -$2.15/sh licensing-stage [Assumption]
inputs.normalization_note: Positive GAAP net income $356M driven by warrant/derivative gains — not owner cash. Lawrence uses cash burn from operations.

optionality_gate.notes: Cash $836M / 318M ≈ $2.63/sh is liquidity not dhando floor; reactor option sized separately

segments_or_options.label: NuScale Power Module reactor pipeline
segments_or_options.notes: ENTRA1 non-binding 72 NPM agreement; Romania Doicesti approval Feb 2026; PMA milestone $260M due 2026

segments_or_options.label: Cash and near-cash
segments_or_options.notes: Cash $836M at 12/31/2025 — not economic moat floor

bear.notes: Pipeline stalls; dilution from $338M 2026 contractual obligations; cash burn

lines.label: Probability-weighted NPM deployment (18% × $48)
lines.source: ENTRA1 72 NPM non-binding; Romania Doicesti Feb 2026 [Assumption]

lines.label: Engineering/licensing runoff value
lines.source: Tie-out to $17.50 payoff; Fluor revenue concentration 76% FY2025

bull.notes: First U.S. SMR deployment; royalty stream on 6+ modules; Fluor exclusivity amended

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Pre-revenue developer; equity $1.17B reflects capital raises not hidden land

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline?
option_scan.evidence: NRC-certified SMR design; ENTRA1 72 NPM LOI; Doicesti Romania approval Feb 2026 (10-K subsequent events)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Operating loss ~$690M FY2025; R&D $45.5M — burden in cash burn, no operating profit segment

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: PMA Milestone Contribution 1 liability $260M triggered by ENTRA1 72 NPM non-binding agreement (10-K)

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Fluor relationship is customer/licensee not unmarked stake

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or royalty trust

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 revenue $24M is engineering/licensing to Fluor (76%), not reactor electricity sales

growth_explanation.mechanism: First NPM deployment converts pipeline to recurring royalties; until then cash burn funded by equity
growth_explanation.base_growth_source: Yield-curve payoff not growth DCF — [Assumption] 18% deploy probability
